name: Kakaako Farmers Market
tagline: Saturday morning market in Kakaako's Ward Village — strong food vendor lineup and a growing local following.
bestTime: 8:30-10am before it gets too hot and the best items sell out
talkStory: This Saturday morning market at Ward Village has grown from a small pop-up into a serious alternative to KCC for town-side residents. The Howard Hughes Corporation, which developed Ward Village, supports the market as a neighborhood-building amenity. The prepared food vendor lineup rotates but consistently draws from Honolulu's best small food businesses. Less chaotic than KCC with easier parking and a sleek urban setting among the new Kakaako towers.
